form.formComment: Hasn't been that impressive recently but she has solid credentials over this track and distance. Expected to go very well.

form.formComment: Strong performance after racing just off the speed to win by a neck at Geelong over 400m (23.21) beating Zipping Scooby in Grade 5 on April 1. Capable of a good showing.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 450m at this track. Prefer in something easier.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Good performance after tracking the speed to win by half a length at this track over 450m (25.92) beating Soda Swan in T3 RSTW on April 13. Likely to find this a bit tough.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (23.28) over 400m at Geelong. Awkward draw to overcome. One of the better hopes.

form.formComment: Good effort to score just four days ago over 460m at Warragul by 1.75 lengths in a Grade 5. Yet to win but has been in the money five times from eight starts off this box. Right in the mix.

form.formComment: Ran a better race when second behind Old Habits at Warragul last start over 400m (23.18). Has to be respected.

form.formComment: Last start finished 3rd over 450m at this track beaten 13 lengths (26.56) behind Moraine Bluey in a Grade 5 on April 13. More than capable and well placed to find his best form.
